title: Marketing Analyst / Sales Analyst (m/w/d)
required_skills: Strong analytical skills and numerical understanding
matched_skills: Business/management degrees (3 degrees incl. Master of Management)
Strong analytical skills — core throughout all roles
Excel and PowerPoint — explicitly mentioned across CV
core_responsibilities: Market analysis, market data, product analysis and reporting for Marketing & Sales leadership
Strategic annual and budget planning support
Coordination of central marketing/sales projects (e.g. marketing plan, bonus calculation)
Interface function for cost planning, investment management, forecast and price management
Accompanying global projects at national level
recommended_emphasis: Lead with analytical reporting and market analysis experience across multiple industries
Highlight Excel and PowerPoint as primary tools explicitly
Frame HSBC budget planning work as financial planning and cost monitoring analogue
Frame GRG Banking market analysis as product/market analysis experience
Note SAP gap honestly — consider omitting if not central to role
